string.text: Security Doll Squad Leader, Mosin-Nagant, at your service... Huh? Aren't you... the Commander? It's been so long! Where have you been all this time?
I just arrived in the Zone. Happy to see you here, Mosin!
Hello, Commander! Let's work hard and aim for the top today!
Mosin, aren't you overheating under that hat?
My hat... Does it look like it's overheating me? Hahaha, I won't take it off even if you say so, Commander.
I can't believe you'd entrust such an important mission to an old Doll like me... Thank you, Commander! I'll do my best!
Okay Mosin, enough for today, please head back to base.
